statistical_anchor: Price at $436.98 sits at the 0.1 position of its 10-day range and holds 3.7% above the 50-day MA ($421.86), but a +1.39% daily gain on only 0.73x average volume suggests the bounce lacks conviction.
volume_assessment: Thin tape noise. Volume at 0.73x the 30-day average indicates weak participation; the +1.39% move is statistically likely to be a liquidity-driven bounce rather than institutional accumulation, reducing durability.
trend_assessment: Short-term trend is down (-3.28% over 3 days) with price anchored at the lower extreme of its recent range (0.1 position). Momentum is neutral-to-weak; holding above the 50-day MA provides a quantitative floor but does not confirm reversal without volume expansion.
regime_context: Normal volatility regime (VIX ~16.9) and stable rate environment (10Y UST 4.2%) historically favor range-bound semiconductor behavior over directional breaks. TSM's relative lag (+1.39% vs SMH +2.97%) signals sector rotation or idiosyncratic pressure rather than systemic demand weakness.
watch_items: Volume expansion above 1.5x 30-day average on a close above $445
